ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EpicGames/raddebugger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EpicGames/raddebugger
Language: c
A native, user-mode, multi-process, graphical debugger.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FRRouting/frr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FRRouting/frr
Language: c
The FRRouting Protocol Suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HandBrake/HandBrake
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HandBrake/HandBrake
Language: c
HandBrake's development repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HarbourMasters/Shipwright
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HarbourMasters/Shipwright
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RsyncProject/rsync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RsyncProject/rsync
Language: c
An open source utility that provides fast incremental file transfer. It also has useful features for backup and restore operations among many other use cases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: acidanthera/OpenCorePkg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/acidanthera/OpenCorePkg
Language: c
OpenCore bootloader

ns0:entry.ns0:title: califio/publications
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/califio/publications
Language: c
Publications from Calif

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coredevices/PebbleOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coredevices/PebbleOS
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: darktable-org/darktable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/darktable-org/darktable
Language: c
darktable is an open source photography workflow application and raw developer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: micropython/micropython
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/micropython/micropython
Language: c
MicroPython - a lean and efficient Python implementation for microcontrollers and constrained systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: php/php-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/php/php-src
Language: c
The PHP Interpreter

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raspberrypi/linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raspberrypi/linux
Language: c
Kernel source tree for Raspberry Pi-provided kernel builds. Issues unrelated to the linux kernel should be posted on the community forum at https://forums.raspberrypi.com/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass
Language: c
Free, open-source iCloud activation lock bypass tool. Remove iCloud lock from iPhone 5s through iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 12-26.1). Fully offline -- no servers, no payments. Supports checkm8 (A5-A11) and session activation (A12+).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valinet/ExplorerPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valinet/ExplorerPatcher
Language: c
This project aims to enhance the working environment on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: veracrypt/VeraCrypt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/veracrypt/VeraCrypt
Language: c
Disk encryption with strong security based on TrueCrypt

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
